enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps his previous day working long hours on a 3D modeling or mapping project of ancient Rome in Boulder, specifically studying the layout of a Roman emperor's palace (Casa Privata di Traiano). He mentions sleeping only four hours and describes his plans for the current day, which include an insurance meeting for his condo and paid work for his mom.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Extremely excited and fascinated; considers it the most amazing thing he has ever worked on
Believes it should have been shown in films like Rome and is proud his work will finally visualize it
